# Student Candidate: student.agent.md (Iteration 1)

The optimized `student.agent.md` produced in the manual-followup optimization pass.

## Key improvements over original

1. Added inline "Smallest defensible revision" scope boundary definition
2. Replaced vague teacher-handoff trigger with three observable workspace conditions
3. Added explicit evidence reading order (4-step numbered list, stop-reading condition)
4. Added missing-steering fallback (step 2 of Approach)
5. Added conflict resolution rule for STEERING.md vs summary.md (step 3 of Approach)
6. Added three-outcome self-check rule in Constraints and Approach
7. Consolidated engineer-handoff condition into Constraints only (removed Approach duplicate)
8. Replaced unstructured output list with six labeled sections template

## Predicted teacher approval

High confidence in approval for all 7 targeted issues. The revision is minimal (no interface changes, no new handoff targets added, frontmatter unchanged).
